# Characters

- **Tommaso Grimaldi** — an inquisitor of the state, 34. Took the post after
  his brother disappeared. POV for *tiny-inquisitor*.
- **Lucia Barbaro** — an apothecary at Ponte San Giovanni, 29. Suspects the
  Zecca fire was set to cover a fraud but will not say so aloud.
- **Master Giraldo** — a coin-assayer at the Zecca. Missing two fingers
  since the fire.
- **Benedetta** — a copyist at the archbishop's palace. Moves paper between
  factions the inquisitor cannot name.
